diagrams.title: Linear Transformation as Matrix-Vector Multiplication
diagrams.description: Shows how input vector [x,y] transforms to output using matrix multiplication
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the computational process of linear transformation

diagrams.title: Kernel and Image Visualization
diagrams.description: Domain space showing kernel (collapsed to zero) and image (transformed subspace)
diagrams.purpose: Understand how transformation collapses some directions while preserving others

diagrams.title: Change of Basis Diagram
diagrams.description: Same transformation viewed in two different bases
diagrams.purpose: See how matrix representation changes with basis choice
